name: King of the Hill
description: Hank, Peggy, Bobby, and the alley dwellers of Arlen, Texas — Mike Judge's animated slice of suburban life.

questions.q: Who co-created 'King of the Hill' alongside Greg Daniels?

source.notes: Judge also created Beavis and Butt-Head, Idiocracy, and Silicon Valley.

questions.q: In what fictional Texas town is 'King of the Hill' set?

source.notes: Inspired by Mike Judge's hometown of Garland, TX.

questions.q: On which network did 'King of the Hill' originally air?
How many seasons did the original 'King of the Hill' run?

source.notes: 1997-2010, 259 episodes. A revival was announced for Hulu in 2025.

questions.q: In what year did 'King of the Hill' premiere?
Who voices Hank Hill?

source.notes: Judge co-created the show. He also voices Boomhauer.

questions.q: What is Hank Hill's profession?

source.notes: Assistant manager at Strickland Propane. Catchphrase: 'I sell propane and propane accessories.'

questions.q: Who voices Bobby Hill, Hank and Peggy's son?

source.notes: Won an Emmy for the role in 2002.

questions.q: Hank's conspiracy-theorist best friend, who works as an exterminator, is named what?

source.notes: Voiced by Johnny Hardwick. Wears Mack-style sunglasses; uses the alias 'Rusty Shackleford'.

questions.q: What is the name of Hank's WWII-veteran father, who lost his shins below the knee?

source.notes: Famously claims he 'killed fitty men' in the war.

questions.q: Hank's hapless, balding, lonely Army-barber friend is named what?
Which Hill alley friend speaks in fast, mumbled, jumbled English?

source.notes: Voiced by Mike Judge. His real first name is revealed to be Jeff in the final episode.

questions.q: What is the name of the Laotian-American family who lives next door to the Hills?

source.notes: Kahn, his wife Minh, and daughter Connie (Kahn Jr.).

questions.q: What is the name of Hank's owner of Strickland Propane?
What is Peggy Hill's profession?

source.notes: Despite her enthusiasm, her Spanish is famously, hilariously bad.

questions.q: Who is Peggy's niece, who lives with the Hills early in the show?

source.notes: Voiced by Brittany Murphy until her death in 2009.

questions.q: What is the name of the Hill family's dog?
What is the name of the giant retail store satirizing Walmart in the show?

source.notes: A 1998 episode famously features a Mega Lo Mart explosion.

questions.q: Which character on the show is the secret biological father of Joseph Gribble?

source.notes: Native American masseuse / spiritual healer; Dale never figures it out.

questions.q: What is Hank's signature catchphrase about his trade?

source.notes: 'Taste the meat, not the heat.' Other famous Hank-isms include 'I tell you hwhat' and 'That boy ain't right.'
